title: Tries, Prefix Search, and String Algorithms
description: Build an autocomplete and route-prefix service with predictable matching behavior. Learners cumulatively produce a Unicode-aware prefix index and matcher through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Represent shared prefixes, terminal markers, and child transitions without confusing words and prefixes.
Implement insert, exact lookup, prefix lookup, delete, and bounded suggestions.
Define Unicode normalization and case policy before indexing or comparison.
